content:
type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py:Option.__init__,Option.to_info_dict,Option.type_cast_value(~2645-2716)
summary: Finished batch_size feature: added Option(batch_size=...) param, validation (TypeError if not multiple, ValueError if negative), info_dict field, and type_cast_value override that chunks converted multiple values into tuples of batch_size. All existing tests pass except pre-existing test_info_dict.py assertions that don't yet expect the new batch_size key (expected, since spec requires always including it).
